result.markdown: --- title: "汽车性能分析" subtitle: "假设检验的应用" date: today author: "Li Zongzhang" format: revealjs: incremental: FALSE theme: sky slide-number: true chalkboard: buttons: false preview-links: auto css: styles.css footer: include-before-body: header.html code-block-height: 100px --- ## 1 数据和变量 数据来源：mpg {ggplot2} 样本容量：234 cty: city miles per gallon hwy: highway miles per gallon - 英里每加仑，数值越大，代表越省油。 trans: type of transmission drv: the type of drive train, - f = front-wheel drive, - r = rear wheel drive, - 4 = 4wd ## 2 油耗性能分析 2.1 cty均值的检验 2.2 hwy均值的检验 2.3 四驱和前驱城市油耗比较 2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较 2.5 自动档和手动挡城市油耗比较 2.5 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较 # 加载包和调用数据 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(tidyverse) library(ggstatsplot) data(mpg) ``` ::: ## 2.1 cty均值的检验 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} gghistostats(mpg, cty, test.value = 16, bin.args = list(color = "black", fill = "cyan")) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=1440} ::: ::: ## 2.1 cty均值的检验 $H_0: \mu \leq 16$ $H_1: \mu > 16$ 拒绝原假设$H_0: \mu \leq 16$ 。 在城市, 油耗均值大于16英里/加仑。 ## 2.2 hwy均值的检验 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} gghistostats(mpg, hwy, test.value = 22, bin.args = list(color = "grey", fill = "purple"), centrality.line.args = list(color = "red", linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed")) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 2.2 hwy均值的检验 $H_0: \mu \leq 22$ $H_1: \mu > 22$ 拒绝原假设$H_0: \mu \leq 22$ 。 在高速, 油耗均值大于22英里/加仑。 ## 2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mpg %>% filter(drv %in% c("4", "f")) %>% ggbetweenstats(drv, cty, p.adjust.method = "none", xlab = "drive", package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Set1", violin.args = list(width = 0) ) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 2.3 四驱和前驱城市道路油耗比较 $H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f$ $H_1: \mu_4 < \mu_f$ 在城市, $\mu_4 < \mu_f$, 前驱(20)比四驱(14)省油。 ## 2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mpg %>% filter(drv %in% c("4", "f")) %>% ggbetweenstats(drv, hwy, p.adjust.method = "none", xlab = "drive", package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Set1", violin.args = list(width = 0) ) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 2.4 四驱和前驱高速油耗比较 $H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f$ $H_1: \mu_4 < \mu_f$ 拒绝原假设$H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f$。 在高速, $\mu_4 < \mu_f$, 前驱(28)比四驱(24)省油。 ## 2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mpg %>% mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", "automatic", "manual")) %>% ggbetweenstats(transmission, cty, p.adjust.method = "none", xlab = "drive", package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Set1", violin.args = list(width = 0) ) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 2.5 自动档和手动挡城市道路油耗比较 $H_0: \mu_{auto} \geq \mu_{manual}$ $H_1: \mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}$ 拒绝原假设$H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f$。 在城市, $\mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}$ , 手动挡(19)比自动挡(16)省油。 ## 2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mpg %>% mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", "automatic", "manual")) %>% ggbetweenstats(transmission, hwy, p.adjust.method = "none", xlab = "drive", package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Set1", violin.args = list(width = 0) ) + theme_classic(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 2.6 自动档和手动挡高速油耗比较 $H_0: \mu_{auto} \geq \mu_{manual}$ $H_1: \mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}$ 拒绝原假设$H_0: \mu_4 \geq \mu_f$。 在高速, $\mu_{auto} < \mu_{manual}$ , 手动挡(26)比自动挡(22)省油。 ## 3 驱动类型分布 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #计算三种驱动的百分比 round(100*prop.table(table(mpg$drv))) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` 4 f r 44 45 11 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} ggpiestats(mpg, drv, ratio = c(0.45, 0.45, 0.1), package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Set2")+ theme_bw(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: 四驱、前驱、后驱：45%，45%， 10% ## 4 驱动类型和传动类型的关系分析 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mpg %>% mutate(transmission = if_else(substr(trans, 1, 4) == "auto", "automatic", "manual")) %>% ggbarstats(drv, transmission, package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Paired")+ theme_bw(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: 驱动类型和传动类型相互独立。 ## 5 驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析 ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggbarstats(mpg, drv, cyl, package = "RColorBrewer", palette = "Paired")+ theme_bw(base_size = 15) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](case2pre_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-10-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## 5 驱动类型和气缸数量的关系分析 驱动类型和气缸数量不独立。 4缸，72%前驱，28%四驱; 6缸，54%前驱， 41%四驱，5%后驱; 8缸，1%前驱， 69%四驱，30%后驱。 ## 6 研究结论 - 油耗(单位：miles per gallon 英里每加仑), 数值越大代表越省油 - 城市均值 \> 16, 高速均值 \> 22 - 城市：四驱(14) \< 前驱(20) - 高速：四驱(20) \< 前驱(29) - 城市：自动挡(16) \< 手动挡(19) - 高速：四驱(22) \< 前驱(26 ) ## 6 研究结论 - 高速比城市道路省油 - 前驱比四驱省油，高速(9)比城市(6)的差距更大。 - 手动挡比自动档省油，高速(4)比城市(3)的差距更大。 ## 6 研究结论 - 四驱、前驱、后驱：45%，45%， 10% - 驱动类型和传动类型相互独立。 - 驱动类型和气缸数量不独立。 - 4缸，72%前驱，28%四驱 - 6缸，54%前驱， 41%四驱，5%后驱 - 8缸，1%前驱， 69%四驱，30%后驱 # 7 经验分享 - 类别的定义：自动挡和手动挡 - 各个类别的样本容量 - 提炼结论 ## ::: {style="text-align: center; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); font-size: 60px;white-space: nowrap;"} Thanks for your attention！ :::
